tools.name: payload_analyze
tools.description: Analyze a JSON API response payload structure — field count, size in bytes, max nesting depth, type distribution, null field count, and redundancy signals (empty arrays, null values).

tools.name: field_prune_suggest
tools.description: Identify and suggest unnecessary fields for removal from a JSON payload. Flags debug/temp/internal/deprecated fields, null values, empty arrays, and _ prefix fields.

tools.name: bandwidth_cost_calc
tools.description: Calculate cloud API egress bandwidth costs for a given payload size and monthly traffic. Returns cost at 25%, 50%, and 75% reduction scenarios.

tools.name: compare_payloads
tools.description: Compare an original payload to an optimized version. Returns size reduction %, removed field paths, and depth change.
